shorts.description: State police say 34-year-old Charles Costanzo was killed in the officer-involved shooting along Wilson Avenue in Mansfield Thursday morning.
shorts.content: State police say 34-year-old Charles Costanzo was killed in the officer-involved shooting along Wilson Avenue in Mansfield Thursday morning.
shorts.content_distilled: State police say 34-year-old Charles Costanzo was killed in the officer-involved shooting along Wilson Avenue in Mansfield Thursday morning.

shorts.title: School catches fire during thunderstorm in Lackawanna County
shorts.title_distilled: School catches fire during thunderstorm in Lackawanna County.
shorts.description: PECKVILLE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) - A lightning strike forced fire crews to battle a blaze and the elements after it struck a school in Peckville Thursday evening. Video sent to us by Angela Powell showed the school burning before crews arrived. The call came at 8:31 p.m. in the 500 block of Keystone Avenue. 28/22 [...]
shorts.content: PECKVILLE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) - A lightning strike forced fire crews to battle a blaze and the elements after it struck a school in Peckville Thursday evening. shorts.title: NJ homicide suspect arrested in Dickson City
shorts.title_distilled: NJ homicide suspect arrested in Dickson City.
shorts.description: DICKSON CITY, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Police in Dickson City assisted in a New Jersey homicide investigation after arresting a potential suspect. Around 6:30 a.m. Thursday, multiple agencies, including the United States Marshals Service Fugitive Task Force and investigators from New Jersey, executed an arrest warrant at a home on 1050 Carmalt Street in Dickson [...]

shorts.title: Robbery suspect dead after police chase
shorts.title_distilled: Robbery suspect dead after police chase.
shorts.description: RICHMOND TWP., TIOGA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A suspect in several robberies who was wanted by state police is dead after a confrontation with police. Troopers were searching for the man pictured below, later identified as 34-year-old Charles Brandon Costanzo of Old Forge.
